title: Pylon Helper
description: This mod aims to make it easier to wirelessly teleport using Squibble's Mirror Pylon, allowing the player to snap to all 16 possible angles that the machine offers.
body:
# Description
This mod aims to make it easier to wirelessly teleport using [Squibble's Mirror Pylon](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=FnUE-ZaALLw), allowing the player to snap to all 16 possible angles that the machine offers.

# Features
- Snap your camera to all 16 angles supported by the Mirror Pylon
- In-game menu to preview and snap to any angle
- Keybind to instantly snap to a selected angle
- Rename angles with custom names

# Usage
To snap to an angle, open the gui with the gui keybind (default is U) and then press on the angle you want to snap to.

To bind an angle to the snap keybind, open the gui with the gui keybind (default is U) and then press the Bind button next to the angle you want binded to the keybind.

To change the name of an angle, open the gui with the gui keybind (default is U) and then press the settings button in the top left corner of the screen. Then find the angle you want to change the name of, and write the new name.


⠀
> This mod is not affiliated with or endorsed by Squibble.
